name: Shahid Ghafoor
title: Full Stack Software Engineer
tagline: Building scalable mobile apps, backend systems & AI-powered products.
subtitle: Full Stack Software Engineer specializing in Flutter, Node.js, Laravel, React, Next.js, AI integrations, and cloud infrastructure.

bio.short: I'm a full stack software engineer who partners with startups and growing companies to design, build, and ship production-grade mobile apps, backend systems, and AI-powered products.
paragraphs: I'm Shahid, a full stack software engineer based in Multan, Pakistan, working with startups and international clients to turn ambitious product ideas into reliable, scalable software.

I build cross-platform mobile apps with Flutter, robust backend systems with Node.js and Laravel, and modern web experiences with React and Next.js — often wiring them together with AI integrations that make products feel genuinely smart.
I've worked across fintech, healthcare, e-commerce, and logistics, which means I'm comfortable navigating compliance-heavy requirements as easily as fast-moving MVP sprints.

What keeps me in this work is the problem-solving — untangling a messy data model, shaving seconds off an API response, or figuring out the simplest architecture that will still hold up in a year. I care about shipping things that last, not just things that demo well.
